name: Mango Fruit Parfait
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Kiwi, peeled and sliced (4 kiwis)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the mangoes and orange juice in a blender and puree until smooth.
2. Slice 20 of the strawberries, leaving 4 whole. Line the bottom of 4 balloon wineglasses with the sliced strawberries.
3. Pour a thin layer of the mango puree over each glass to cover.
4. Reserving 4 kiwi slices, layer the rest on top of the puree.
5. Divide the remainder of the mango puree among the glasses.
6. Top each with a slice of kiwi surrounded by raspberries.
7. Make a slit in each of the whole strawberries and position 1 on the rim of each glass.
8. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 15 minutes.
